name: Phitsanulok city core
notes: Provincial capital and primary urban node with strongest base demand in the province.

name: Wang Thong gateway town
notes: Eastbound Route 12 junction and gateway between the city and mountain corridor.

name: Nakhon Thai district center
notes: Eastern district service center on the Route 12 corridor toward Loei and Phu Hin Rong Kla.

name: Chat Trakan district center
notes: Remote northeast district coverage node with lower confidence and lower station intensity.

name: Bang Rakam district center
notes: Western district center with local market and civic demand.

name: Phrom Phiram district center
notes: Northern district center on the rail and highway axis.

name: Wat Bot district center
notes: Northeast district support node between Mueang and the mountain-side districts.

name: Noen Maprang district center
notes: Southeast district center with nature-tourism and local community relevance.
